name: 450 Watt LED Shoebox Light | 58500 Lumens | 5700K
description: 450 Watt shoebox – parking lot fixture produces 58500 lumens and has durable die-cast aluminum housing that is powder coated with strong anti-corrosion performance for years of maintenance-free lighting. The fixture comes in a dark bronze finish.
short_desc: Key Features Wattage: 450 Lumens: 58500 Lumens Per Watt: 130 Replaces: 1000 or 1500 Watt Metal Halide Voltage: 100V-277V or 277V-480V Color Temperature: 5700K CRI: 70+ Dimming: 1-10V Beam Angles: Type 3 Optics: Polycarbonate Lens Lifespan: 50,000 (L70) hours Mounting: Arm or Slip Fitter or Trunnion EPA Rating: 2.5 Fixture Color: Bronze Frequency: 50-60Hz Power Factor: .9 THD: 15% Durable Construction Housing: Die-Cast Aluminum IP Rating: IP65 Operating Temperature: -4°F to +104°F Certifications: UL | Rebate Eligible Warranty: 5 years Measurements Dimensions: 36 in L X 13 in W X 3.7 in H Weight: 25 lbs Features/Accessories Photocell Dimming: 1-10V
